name: Void-Forged Overseer
description: After the Sepulcher of the First Ones was opened, this construct of the First Ones was stolen by the brokers and sold to the ethereals in a transaction at the Veiled Market. Under the ethereals' ingenious modifications, it integrated the mysteries of the Aether, gliding through the air with extraordinary elegance, leaving behind a trail of shimmering stardust.
